name: Ruby 12" Iron Side Table - Dark Blue - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Round Wrought Iron Patio End Table
description:
Whether you’re using this in your backyard space or in your living room, combine this accessory with your favorite chair to create a cozy corner. With a sleek, modern barrel structure, this end table is an excellent sidekick to your existing outdoor or indoor furniture, perfect for holding a tray of snacks or a pitcher of lemonade. The frame of our side table features a beautiful lace cut pattern, making this great for any area in need of something new.

MODERN DESIGN: With clean, precise lines, our side is the ideal modern accessory for your space. Finished with a charming barrel structure and lace-cut design, this table not only offers a chic, minimalistic look but also provides incredible structure

LACE CUT DESIGN: Refined with a lace cut design, the frame of this table brings an elegant touch to the overall piece, making it an understated yet chic addition to your home.

METAL FRAME: Constructed of powder-coated iron, the frame of this table is made to be incredibly durable, ensuring that this piece will hold up under use.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This accent table measures to be 12.25” W x 12.25” D x 18.00” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table

NO ASSEMBLY: This accent table comes ready to use straight out of the box. No assembly is required.
